M. Narulkar Professor Employee ID: 69 Qualification: Ph.D. : 0731-2582174 : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr. Sandeep Narulkar is a Professor of Civil Engineering. He also is Dean Students Welfare in the Institute and Teachers' nominee in the governing body of the Institute. His interests are Water Resources Engineering, Environmental Engineering and Public Transport Studies. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Year University/Institute Division Specialization 1 B.E. 1983 DAVV, Indore I st Civil Engineering 2 M.E. 1987 DAVV, Indore I st Water Resources Engineering 3 Ph.D. 1996 IIT Bombay - Civil Engineering M.E. Dissertation Title: Development of Optimal Operating Policy using Stochastic Dynamic Programming PhD Dissertation Title: Optimum Real Time Operation of Multi-reservoir Systems for Irrigation Scheduling Work Experience: S.No. Employer Designation Department Duration of Employment-In Months Date of Joining Mode of Employment 1 Shri G. S. Institute of Technology & Science, Indore Lecturer Civil Engineering & Applied Mechanics 72 -Sept-1986 Regular 2 Shri G. S. Institute of Technology & Science, Indore Sr. Lecturer Civil Engineering & Applied Mechanics 72 -Sept-1992 Regular 3 Shri G. S. Institute of Technology & Science, Indore Reader Civil Engineering & Applied Mechanics 80 -Oct-1998 Regular 4 Shri G. S. Institute of Technology & Science, Indore Professor Civil Engineering & Applied Mechanics 192 -Jun-2005 Regular Research Details: Area of Research Interest: Reservoir Operations and Systems Analysis of Water Resources Systems Stochastic Hydrology with emphasis on Time-Series Analysis Climate change and hydrology Public Transportation Irrigation Water Management Surface water hydrology Surface and Ground Water Pollution due to Irrigation with Contaminated Water Solid Waste Management GIS and Remote Sensing Applications to Water Resources Engineering PhD Supervision: A.
